languages.text: {n}В глаза бросается набор знакомых чисел. Немногие в просторе способны узнать эту комбинацию, но вы оказались в их числе: эта волна принадлежит к диапазону, который использует {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиция{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}В глаза бросается набор знакомых чисел. Немногие в просторе способны узнать эту комбинацию, но вы оказались в их числе: эта волна принадлежит к диапазону, который использует {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиция{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В глаза бросается набор знакомых чисел. Немногие в просторе способны узнать эту комбинацию, но вы оказались в их числе: эта волна принадлежит к диапазону, который использует {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиция{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

{n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

{n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一串熟悉的数字引起了你的注意。在整个扩区，能认出这个组合的人寥寥无几，可你偏偏就是其中之一。这是{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}使用的频道波段。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一串熟悉的数字引起了你的注意。在整个扩区，能认出这个组合的人寥寥无几，可你偏偏就是其中之一。这是{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}使用的频道波段。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une séquence familière de chiffres attire votre attention. Rares sont ceux dans les Étendues qui reconnaîtraient cette combinaison, mais vous en faites partie et apprenez ainsi que la fréquence appartient à la bande utilisée par l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une séquence familière de chiffres attire votre attention. Rares sont ceux dans les Étendues qui reconnaîtraient cette combinaison, mais vous en faites partie et apprenez ainsi que la fréquence appartient à la bande utilisée par l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tanıdık bir sayı dizisi gözüne çarpıyor. Enginlik'teki pek az kişi bu kombinasyonu tanıyabilir, şansına sen de onlardansın. Bu frekans, {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'un{/g} kullandığı banda ait.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tanıdık bir sayı dizisi gözüne çarpıyor. Enginlik'teki pek az kişi bu kombinasyonu tanıyabilir, şansına sen de onlardansın. Bu frekans, {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'un{/g} kullandığı banda ait.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Una secuencia de números familiar te llama la atención. Pocos habitantes de la Extensión reconocerían la combinación, pero tú estás entre ellos: es la frecuencia de banda que utiliza la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Una secuencia de números familiar te llama la atención. Pocos habitantes de la Extensión reconocerían la combinación, pero tú estás entre ellos: es la frecuencia de banda que utiliza la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine vertraute Sequenz von Ziffern erregt deine Aufmerksamkeit. In der Ausdehnung würden diese Kombination außer dir nur wenige erkennen: Diese Frequenz wird von der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} genutzt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine vertraute Sequenz von Ziffern erregt deine Aufmerksamkeit. In der Ausdehnung würden diese Kombination außer dir nur wenige erkennen: Diese Frequenz wird von der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} genutzt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}馴染みのある数字の並びが目に留まる。この組み合わせは、エクスパンズではほとんどの人が認識できないだろうが、あなたは知っている。この周波数は、{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}インキジション{/g}が使用するバンドに属している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A familiar sequence of numbers draws your eye. Few in the Expanse would recognise this combination, but you are one of them: this frequency belongs to the band used by the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}.{/n}
